docs: Multi-sig governance contract with timelock enforcement for MRV
ecosystem actions: emergency pause, VVB accreditation, GSOC verifier
management, and Green Badge issuance.
abi.name: MrvGovernance

docs: Initializes the signer set, approval threshold, and timelock duration.
Upgrades storage layout version if needed and preserves existing state.
Proposes adding a governance signer.
endpoints.name: proposeAddSigner

docs: Proposes removing a governance signer.
endpoints.name: proposeRemoveSigner

docs: Proposes changing the approval threshold.
endpoints.name: proposeApprovalThresholdChange

docs: Proposes changing the governance timelock.
endpoints.name: proposeTimelockChange

docs: Create an emergency pause/unpause proposal. Subject to timelock and multi-sig approval.
endpoints.name: proposeEmergencyPause

docs: Propose granting or revoking VVB accreditation for a verifier address.
endpoints.name: proposeVerifierAccreditation

docs: Proposes Green Badge SFT issuance for a farmer address.
endpoints.name: proposeBadgeIssuance

docs: Record caller's approval for a pending proposal. Duplicate approvals are rejected.
endpoints.name: approveProposal

docs: Executes a fully approved proposal after the timelock expires.
Proposals remain executable for 30 days after `eta`.
endpoints.name: executeProposal

docs: Returns true if the given verifier DID holds an active (approved=true)
accreditation. Used by mrv/registry to gate submitVerificationStatement().
endpoints.name: isAccreditedVvb

docs: Returns the governance-approved badge metadata hash for a farmer, if present.
endpoints.name: getBadgeIssuance

docs: Proposes adding a GSOC verifier.
GSOC verifiers are distinct from VVB accreditations and remain scoped
to the GSOC methodology and jurisdiction data stored in this contract.
endpoints.name: proposeGsocVerifier

docs: Approves a GSOC verifier proposal.
endpoints.name: approveGsocVerifierProposal

docs: Executes a proposed GSOC verifier addition after the timelock and
approval threshold are satisfied.
endpoints.name: executeGsocVerifierProposal

docs: Proposes revoking a GSOC verifier through the standard timelocked
governance proposal flow.
endpoints.name: proposeRemoveGsocVerifier

docs: Storage layout version for forward-compatible upgrades.
endpoints.name: getStorageVersion

docs: Emitted when a Green Badge issuance is executed.
Multi-sig governance proposal supporting pause, verifier accreditation,
and Green Badge issuance actions.
VVB accreditation record with role assignment and approval state.
Shared across MRV contracts that need to reference verifier accreditations
in cross-contract interactions or ABI generation.
